calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2015 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-25-2015 Set For Trial On Aug-17-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Attorney RAYMOND BURKE of the Law Office of Michael Heath, Tel No. (415) 931-4207 appearing for Defendant Donald M. Berger;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - There being no filed opposition to defendant's motion, and defense counsel having supplied the Court with a copy of its moving papers at today's hearing, the Court granted defense counsel's request for the Court to rule on defendant's motion today. Having reviewed the moving papers, the Court vacated its tentative ruling, and ordered as follows: DEFENDANT DONALD M. BERGER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT is granted. No opposition filed. The Court's previously indicated continuance date for this motion of 2/25/15 is taken off calendar. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
